summary: Tested LLM-powered obligation rewrite functionality. All features working correctly: Backend APIs (POST /api/obligations/{id}/rewrite, GET /api/obligations/rewrite-status), Frontend 5-section display, and Generate button integration with Claude Sonnet 4.5.

issues: Console shows many 'duplicate key' warnings for obligation IDs (mining-base-metals-0, etc.) - same ID exists across multiple company_ids causing React key conflicts

Minor HTML validation warning:
inside

in SheetDescription component (nested elements)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/obligations/rewrite-status returns 200 with correct structure (total, rewritten, pending, percentage)
Backend: GET /api/obligations/{id} returns plain_language_summary when present
Backend: plain_language_summary contains all 5 required sections
Backend: GET /api/obligations list includes plain_language_summary in response
Frontend: Compliance Matrix loads with 181 obligations
Frontend: Detail sheet opens correctly when clicking view button
Frontend: Generate button visible for obligations without summary
Frontend: Generate button text changes to 'Generating...' during API call
Frontend: After generation, 5-section summary displays correctly
Frontend: Section 1 'Statute & Jurisdiction' displays with Scale icon
Frontend: Section 2 'Core Obligations' displays with CheckCircle icon
Frontend: Section 3 'Practical Implications' displays with Briefcase icon
Frontend: Section 4 'Key Deadlines & Triggers' displays with Clock icon (visible on scroll)
Frontend: Section 5 'Non-Compliance Risks' displays with AlertTriangle icon (visible on scroll)
Integration: Click Generate button -> API call to rewrite endpoint -> UI updates with new summary
Integration: Rewrite status updates from 1 to 2 after new generation confirming DB persistence
action_items: Minor: Fix duplicate obligation IDs in database - same ID exists for different companies causing React key warnings
Minor: Fix nested HTML elements - Badge (div) inside SheetDescription (p tag) causes HTML validation warning
critical_code_review_comments: The rewrite endpoint correctly uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations.llm.chat
LLM response parsing handles markdown code blocks (```json) gracefully
Frontend conditional rendering logic correct: shows plain_language_summary if exists, otherwise shows Generate button
State management correctly updates both selectedObligation and obligations list after generation
seed_data_creation: One obligation (mining-base-metals-0 for company 15b507cc-00d4-4c61-88c6-e83e4c534efd) had existing plain_language_summary. One new summary generated during testing for Workers Compensation Coverage obligation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM-powered obligation rewrite feature fully functional. POST /api/obligations/{id}/rewrite generates 5-section plain language summary using Claude Sonnet 4.5. GET /api/obligations/rewrite-status returns count of rewritten vs pending. Frontend shows Generate button for obligations without summary and displays 5 color-coded sections (blue/green/purple/amber/red) when summary exists. Currently 2/181 obligations rewritten. REAL LLM integration - no mocking.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected. The duplicate key React warnings are due to obligation IDs being non-unique across companies (same mining-base-metals-0 ID exists for multiple company_ids in database).
